summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Travel chronometer now correctly stores minutos_trabalhados and horas_arredondadas. All 10 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: Line 8789 in server.py now adds minutos_trabalhados = int(seg['duracao_minutos']) to registo_dict
Bug fix verified: Line 8790 adds origem = 'cronometro' field
Migration fix verified: Lines 221-261 now only update records where minutos_trabalhados is None and computes from timestamps
seed_data_creation: Used existing relatorio_id 6952755f-2fcf-4d34-a90d-38626782bc86. Created and cleaned up test registos during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix for cronometro minutos_trabalhados verified. The parar_cronometro endpoint now correctly stores minutos_trabalhados (int of duration in minutes) and origem field. The startup migration only runs for records where minutos_trabalhados is None and computes values from timestamps. Note: minutos_trabalhados is int(duracao_minutos), so for durations < 60 seconds it will be 0 (correct behavior). The folha-horas-data endpoint uses 'minutos' field (horas_arredondadas * 60) not minutos_trabalhados.

iniciar_cronometro_viagem.details: Successfully starts viagem chronometer with tipo=viagem, tecnico_id, tecnico_nome, funcao_ot, km_inicial

parar_cronometro_viagem.details: Response includes minutos_trabalhados (int) and horas_arredondadas (float) fields. For viagem, horas_arredondadas = duracao_minutos / 60 (no rounding).

parar_cronometro_trabalho.details: Response includes minutos_trabalhados and horas_arredondadas. For trabalho, horas_arredondadas has minimum 1.0 hour due to rounding rules.

get_registos_tecnicos.details: Returns records with minutos_trabalhados field present

get_folha_horas_data.details: Returns registos_individuais with 'minutos' field (calculated from horas_arredondadas * 60)

migration_no_corruption.details: Verified startup migration doesn't corrupt existing records. Migration only updates records where minutos_trabalhados is None.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Travel chronometer stops but fails to auto-calculate totals (minutos_trabalhados, horas_arredondadas)
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_1: parar_cronometro endpoint did not store minutos_trabalhados in registo_dict
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_2: Startup migration was corrupting horas_arredondadas to 0.0 for records missing minutos_trabalhados
bug_fix_verification.fix_2: Lines 221-261: Migration now only runs for records where minutos_trabalhados is None and computes from timestamps
bug_fix_verification.verification: All tests pass - minutos_trabalhados field is present in parar_cronometro response and persisted in database
